title: Add AI chatbot assistant 'Vedu' for user assistance and appointment booking

requirements.text: Create a chatbot UI component named 'Vedu' with a floating chat bubble icon positioned in the bottom-left corner (opposite the WhatsApp button). The icon should display when collapsed and expand into a chat interface when clicked.

quotes: add an ai chat bot assistant " Vedu "

acceptanceCriteria: Chat bubble icon appears in bottom-left corner with consistent styling to match the application theme
Clicking the icon opens a chat interface overlay
Chat interface displays 'Vedu' as the assistant name in the header
Chat interface can be minimized back to the bubble icon

requirements.text: Implement chat interface with message history display, user input field, and send button. Messages should display with timestamps and differentiate between user messages and Vedu's responses using distinct styling.
acceptanceCriteria: Chat interface shows scrollable message history
User can type messages in an input field at the bottom
Send button or Enter key submits the message
User messages and bot responses are visually distinct
Messages display in chronological order with timestamps

requirements.text: Create backend function to handle chat messages and generate contextual responses about Vedahealar services (numerology, name correction, lucky numbers, reiki healing, business name analysis). Include information about the consultation booking process and pricing.

quotes: assist to know more about vedahealar

acceptanceCriteria: Backend exposes a chat endpoint that accepts user messages
Responses provide accurate information about all five Vedahealar services
Bot can explain the consultation booking process
Bot can provide pricing information for services
Responses are contextual and conversational in tone

requirements.text: Implement appointment booking assistance where Vedu can guide users through the booking process by collecting their name, email, phone number, preferred date/time, and service selection through conversational interactions. When complete, trigger the same booking submission to the Google Apps Script endpoint used by BookingForm.

quotes: help users to book an appointment

acceptanceCriteria: Vedu can initiate the booking flow through chat conversation
Bot collects all required booking fields (name, email, phone, date, time, service, optional message) conversationally
Bot validates inputs during the conversation (email format, phone number, future dates)
Upon completion, booking data is submitted to the same Google Apps Script endpoint as BookingForm
User receives confirmation message in chat after successful booking

requirements.text: Add greeting message from Vedu when chat is first opened, introducing itself and offering assistance with learning about Vedahealar services or booking an appointment.
acceptanceCriteria: When chat interface is opened for the first time, Vedu sends an automatic greeting message
Greeting introduces Vedu by name and explains its purpose
Greeting offers specific help options (learn about services, book appointment)

constraints: Chat interface must not overlap or interfere with the existing WhatsApp button in the bottom-right corner
Booking submissions through the chatbot must use the existing Google Apps Script endpoint (same as BookingForm component)
Maintain consistent design language with existing Veda Healar theme (deep blue, gold accent, beige background)
nonGoals: Integration with external AI services or APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.)
Chat history persistence across sessions or devices

required: Chatbot avatar icon for Vedu with spiritual/Vedic theme (vedu-avatar.dim_64x64.png)
